summary: Comprehensive testing of Paradigm genetic computing platform completed. All 22 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with 3-panel studio layout, 3D WebGL viewport, all tabs working (Gallery, Lineage, Library, Genes, Evolve, Breed, Compose, GSPL, Export). No critical issues found.

minor.issue: LLM budget exceeded error in logs (not blocking - seed generation still works via GSPL)

issues: Minor: eslint warning about missing dependency 'domainColors' in PreviewViewport.js useEffect

passed_tests: Landing page loads with PARADIGM heading and navigation
Studio page renders with correct 3-panel layout (left sidebar, center viewport, right sidebar)
Gallery tab shows seeds from GET /api/seeds (32 seeds found)
Clicking a seed in gallery loads it and shows 3D viewport with canvas element
3D/2D toggle buttons switch between views correctly
Gene Editor shows genes of selected seed with sliders (colors, symmetry, resolution, paletteSize, animation)
Lineage tab shows SVG lineage graph with nodes
Library tab shows Seed Commons with 20 seeds, domain filters and import buttons
GSPL tab has code editor with Parse and Run buttons
GSPL Parse button calls POST /api/gspl/parse and shows results (Tokens: 61, Decls: 4)
Compose tab shows domain selector, Find Path and Compose buttons, functor graph (9 bridges)
Evolve tab has algorithm select (MAP ELITES), population/generation sliders, evolve button
Breed tab shows parent selectors and Breed Seeds button
Export tab shows seed JSON, Generate Keypair, Verify Signature, Download .gseed controls
Status bar shows current seed info (hash, fitness, generation, domain, signed status)
GET /api/ returns engine info (layers=7, domains=26, gene_types=17, engines=26, functors=9)
GET /api/library returns seed library with 20+ seeds
critical_code_review_comments: PreviewViewport.js has eslint warning about missing 'domainColors' dependency in useEffect - minor issue, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Test seeds created during pytest: TEST_Pytest Warrior, TEST_ToDelete, TEST_GSPL Hero, TEST_ComposeSource, TEST_GeneEdit
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified working. Frontend studio has 3-panel layout with all tabs functional. 3D WebGL viewport renders domain-specific shapes. GSPL parser and executor working. Composition paths and functor bridges working. Library has 20+ seeds. Evolution, breeding, mutation all functional. Sovereignty signing/verification working.
